name: glean
description: Access enterprise knowledge with Glean's remote MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Glean brings enterprise context to ChatGPT and Codex through its remote MCP server. Search across connected company data sources, find employees by name, role, or expertise, read documents and emails, look up meeting details, and use custom agent workflows tailored to your organization.
defaultPrompt: Find an employee or team in Glean.
Fetch a Glean document by URL.
